_comment: Personas drive permission trimming. A persona sees a fixture if the fixture acl contains the persona id OR 'all'. duty_manager = full facilities view incl tenant-confidential commitments + vendor SLA/penalties; ops_engineer = internal ops + the SLA register but NOT tenant-confidential commitment threads or the master agreement; contractor = least privilege; director = sees everything.

personas.label: Marco Reyes — Facilities Duty Manager (covering)
personas.description: Full facilities leadership view including tenant-confidential notification commitments and vendor commercial terms.

personas.label: Derek Owens — Mechanical Engineer
personas.description: Sees all internal operations, work orders, and the vendor SLA/penalty register, but NOT tenant-confidential commitment threads or the vendor master agreement.

personas.label: Victor Hale — Subcontractor Technician (vendor)
personas.description: Least-privilege vendor. Sees only non-sensitive operational signals; cannot see tenant commitments, the SLA/penalty register, or the master agreement.

personas.label: Helen Stamos — Director, Portfolio Operations (escalation)
personas.description: Executive escalation view. Sees everything duty_manager sees.
